metabolic_gate: Dynamic metabolic constraint: reduces Feed (F) only when activator V exceeds C-crit.
visc_u: U Viscosity (α | δ): How strongly U's concentration slows U's own diffusion (α) or V's diffusion (δ).
visc_v: V Viscosity (β | γ): How strongly V's concentration slows V's own diffusion (β) or U's diffusion (γ).
advection: Advective Tugging (Kuu | Kvv): Spatial coupling where species gradients pull themselves into 'tighter' regions.
cross_advection: Cross Tugging (Kvu | Kuv): Interaction where one species gradient induces advection in the other.
